findings:
## Exec Conductor & Worker Archaeology — TASK-293

---
### 1. Exec Conductor Audit
| Conductor | Role label ✓ | "Not leaf" ✓ | agents: YAML ✓ | write_mandate_result ✓ |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| exec-impl | ✅ | ✅ | ⚠️ PARTIAL (worker-guide-writer missing from YAML) | ✅ |
| exec-test | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| exec-doc | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |

---
### 2. Worker Audit
| Worker | Leaf Node label | NEVER dispatches | Dispatched-by correct | Conductor |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| worker-impl | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ exec-impl | exec-impl |
| worker-test | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ exec-test | exec-test |
| worker-doc | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ exec-doc | exec-doc |
| worker-coder | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ "coord ONLY" | NONE |
| worker-tester | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ "coord ONLY" | NONE |
| worker-documenter | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ "coord ONLY" | NONE |
| worker-build-diagnostics | ⚠️ lowercase only | ✅ | ✅ exec-impl or exec-test (RESOLVE) | Both exec-impl & exec-test |
| worker-refactor | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ "coord ONLY" | NONE |
| worker-workspace | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ coord-direct INTENTIONAL | coord (documented exception) |

---
### 3. Worker → Conductor Mapping
| Worker | Owned by | Intentional? |
|---|---|---|
| worker-impl | exec-impl | ✅ |
| worker-test | exec-test | ✅ |
| worker-doc | exec-doc | ✅ |
| worker-coder | coord directly | ⚠️ Ambiguous |
| worker-tester | coord directly | ⚠️ Ambiguous |
| worker-documenter | coord directly | ⚠️ Ambiguous |
| worker-build-diagnostics | exec-impl + exec-test (RESOLVE) | ✅ |
| worker-refactor | coord directly | ⚠️ Likely intentional (no exec-refactor exists) |
| worker-workspace | coord directly | ✅ Documented exception |

---
### 4. CRITICAL: Two Parallel Ring 4 Dispatch Patterns

**Pattern A — Conductor-mediated (MAP/REDUCE):**
`coord → exec-impl → {worker-impl, analyst-web, worker-build-diagnostics}`
Conductors write MandateResults; referenced in exec-*.agent.md and copilot-instructions.

**Pattern B — Coord-direct (flat):**
`coord → worker-coder → worker-tester ∥ worker-documenter`
No conductor; referenced in AGENT-DISPATCH-PROTOCOL Triage table.

Both patterns coexist. AGENT-DISPATCH-PROTOCOL Ring 4 Radial Spokes table lists both `worker-impl, worker-coder` and `worker-test, worker-tester` as coequal alternatives without disambiguation guidance.

---
### 5. Specific Inconsistencies

**I1:** worker-coder/tester/documenter/refactor say "coord ONLY" but copilot-instructions Ring 4 says "Workers dispatched by conductors NOT coord".

**I2:** worker-build-diagnostics missing formal bold `**Leaf Node**` label in Contract section (uses lowercase inline only).

**I3:** worker-refactor has no conductor — coord-direct only.

**I4:** exec-impl Phase 4 references `worker-guide-writer` but it is absent from exec-impl `agents:` YAML.

**I5:** worker-impl says "NEVER: Modify files" (planning-only) but exec-impl Phase 4 says "Delegate to worker-impl for the actual commit" — contradictory.

**I6:** worker-test says "NEVER: Create test files" (planning-only) but exec-test Phase 4 says "Delegate to worker-test for the actual commit" — contradictory.

---
### 6. Domain Mapping (Spider Web Spokes)
| Domain Spoke | Workers |
|---|---|
| Code | worker-impl, worker-coder, worker-refactor |
| Tests | worker-test, worker-tester |
| Docs | worker-doc, worker-documenter |
| Infra/Build/Errors | worker-build-diagnostics, worker-workspace |
| Work Items | worker-devsteps, worker-guide-writer (not scanned) |
recommendations: CRITICAL: Choose ONE Ring 4 pattern. Either exec conductors own all workers, or document the two-pipeline split (conductor vs coord-direct). Update AGENT-DISPATCH-PROTOCOL.md.
FIX I2: Add formal `**Leaf Node**: NEVER dispatches` line to worker-build-diagnostics Contract section to match all other workers.
FIX I3/I4: Create exec-refactor conductor or formally document coord-direct exception. Add worker-guide-writer to exec-impl agents YAML.
FIX I5: Align worker-impl mandate — either it plans (conductor executes) or it executes. The two statements are contradictory.
FIX I6: Align worker-test mandate — "NEVER: Create test files" contradicts exec-test Phase 4 "Delegate to worker-test for the actual commit".
